title: Yenga Pulla Irukka Lyrics Kayal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kayal Yenga Pulla Irukka Song Lyrics
Singer: Balram
Music: D Imman
Lyrics : Yugabharathi

Yenga pulla irukka
nee solladi.
kannu munna nee
konjam nilladi.

Oththaya veguraen
moththamaa noguraen.
idhu yeno thaano
illa illa usurey

Aridhaana porulaaga therindhaayadi
adaikkaa mudiyaamal tholaithaenadi
enakullae pudhu moochai koduthaayaddi
sulal pola adhai neeye iluththaayadi

Poththi vechcha un nenappu
poththukittu kottuthadi.
suththi vitta raatinamaa
en manassu suthuthadi.

Yenga pulla irukka
nee solladi.
kannu munna nee
konjam nilladi.

Enakkaana varam pola pirandhaayadi
thavamedhum puriyaamal kidaithayadi
inimelum ivan vazha mudiyadhadi
irandhaalum unai thaedi alaivenadi

Unna ivan kannu muli
peththavalaa kaanudhadi.
unna ennai appadiye
seeththidavum thonudhadi.

Yenga pulla irukka
nee solladi.
kannu munna nee
konjam nilladi.

Oththaya veguraen
moththamaa noguraen.
idhu yeno thaano
illa illa usurey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yenga Pulla Irukka'?

The song expresses feelings of longing and affection, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Kayal?

In Kayal, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional journey and connection with their love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Balram and composed by D Imman.

When was 'Yenga Pulla Irukka' released?

The song was released on November 14, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yenga Pulla Irukka, the protagonist expresses a deep sense of longing and affection, beautifully captured through Balram's soulful rendition. The song plays a pivotal role in Kayal, highlighting the emotional nuances of love and connection. With D Imman's melodic composition and Yugabharathi's poignant lyrics, it evokes a nostalgic feeling that resonates with listeners. This heartfelt melody is perfect for romantic occasions, making it a cherished addition to Tamil cinema's musical landscape.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yenga Pulla Irukka from Kayal is a soulful melody that captures the essence of longing and romance. With Balram's enchanting vocals and D Imman's captivating composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love. Dive into the heartfelt lyrics penned by Yugabharathi that beautifully express the emotions of yearning and connection.
stanzaMeanings: Are you there, my girl? Please tell me. Just stay a little in front of me.
I am feeling restless and uneasy. I don't know why, oh my.
You have come to me as something I can't understand, and I have lost it without being able to hold on. You have given me a new breath, and you are the one who has written it like a story.
Your thoughts have been thrown away like a book. My mind has been spinning around since last night.
I don't know why, oh my.
Are you there, my girl? Please tell me. Just stay a little in front of me.
You have come to me like a blessing, but I received it without understanding. Even now, I can't live without you, and I will search for you even if it takes two lifetimes.
This person has eyes that seem to have captured you. I feel like you would treat me the same way.
I don't know why, oh my.
Are you there, my girl? Please tell me. Just stay a little in front of me.
I am feeling restless and uneasy. I don't know why, oh my.
